mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway (gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, version, auth, status) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{gatewayName}, #{gatewayDesc}, #{version}, #{auth}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway SET gateway_id = #{gatewayId}, gateway_name = #{gatewayName}, gateway_desc = #{gatewayDesc}, version = #{version}, auth = #{auth}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, version, auth, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway ORDER BY id DESC
